race.description: Mick Qtis Jewel Prelude Qtis 2YO C&G Handicap
race.comment: AREPRICE (1) drifted to start $7.00 but could not have been more impressive on debut six weeks ago, thrashing his rivals by 5.1 lengths after taking charge a long way out. Back a little in trip and the winkers go on. Clearly the pick of the runners with race experience. BOOMTOWNS (3) was scratched last Saturday in a race where a heavily spruiked stablemate was left to shine. Won his only trial back on 10 February. Gollan will have him fully wound up for this. RADOMIR (9) showed pace but dropped out late on debut over this distance at the Sunshine Coast on Boxing Day. Not sighted since. Any firm in the betting should be respected. SWIFT DRAGON (2) started favourite but had the unenviable task of taking the field up to the Slipper-bound Pembrey here a fortnight ago and gassed in the last 150m. Expect a bit more resistance this time. Market watch on Outback Barbie's brother FINAL CRUSADE (4) on debut for the Gollan camp. A couple of trials last Spring were encouraging.
